name: lab
description: /lab — research-lab control-tower (domain-agnostic) with a code-level decision harness (0.7.0) + all-paths autonomy (0.8.0). One persistent mission-control over EVERY in-flight job of a long-running campaign across ANY execution surface (rented pods via cloud · pool hosts · local procs). Ties the manifest (cwd ./pods.json) + event-driven watchers + harvest+verdict + the autonomous harvest→re-dispatch loop into one command. NOT domain-locked — DFT sweeps · ML training fleets · build matrices · render farms · any N-parallel-job campaign with a queued backlog. 1.6.0 makes the MONITORING DEFAULT event-driven WATCHERS, not polling: the continuous-monitoring verbs (auto/drive + any keep-watching flow) now DEFAULT to arming the `watch` verb's event-driven watchers (a Monitor/background loop on `hexa cloud tail <host> <log> --until ''` with the failure-first 3-tier exit 0=DONE·3=TIMEOUT-RESUMABLE·4=CRASHED·255=transport-drop) and re-enter on the watcher EVENT, instead of leading with a tick/poll liveness sweep; the tick/poll sweep is DEMOTED to an explicit FALLBACK (used only when a watcher cannot attach — no `hexa cloud tail --until`, a local-only job with no durable remote log, or transport unavailable), retained not deleted; `status` is EXEMPT and stays a one-shot read-only SNAPSHOT (a single on-demand read, not continuous polling); a new `## monitoring default — watcher (poll = fallback)` subsection (@W1–W4) is the shared rule. bin/system_harness.hexa unchanged. 1.5.0 STRENGTHENS the g59 upstream-reflex to AUTO-DISPATCH the fix UNCONDITIONALLY: when a campaign run detects an upstream-fixable gap (a hexa cloud/deck/CLI limitation · a false-terminal the CLI should have classified · a transport ambiguity · a missing preflight/OOM axis · a cost-leak the rent-guard should prevent · any hand-workaround of the tooling) in watch/harvest/next/auto/drive/pursue or the upstream verb, /lab now (a) files the `sidecar handoff add <repo> <gap>` record as before AND (b) IMMEDIATELY spawns ONE background fix agent (general-purpose · run_in_background · isolation:worktree) that fixes-at-source + ships a PR (branch off main · <200 lines · Co-Authored-By trailer · gh pr create · pr-cycle auto-merge · sidecar sync after) — same-turn, no user confirmation (무조건). This is NOT the 4축 auto-decide fork logic — it is an ALWAYS-ON reflex; an upstream code-fix PR is reversible + low-blast-radius so it never falls under the @L3 human-only gates. The only brakes are idempotency (no re-dispatch of a gap already in the handoff trail or already carrying an open PR — dedup via the upstream verb trail + gh pr list) and a ≤3 in-flight concurrency cap (queue the rest). Logs one line per dispatch — `🔧 upstream auto-dispatch: <gap one-liner> → agent <id> → PR pending (g59 · 무조건)`; the upstream verb trail additionally shows auto-dispatched fixes (agent id + PR state). 1.4.0 ADDS 4축 auto-decide: at any mid-run LLM decision gate in next/auto/drive/pursue where >1 technically-viable option exists, /lab AUTO-PICKS on the canonical 4 axes (완성도 complete · 단순 simple · 안전 safe · 표준 std — recommend.tape r1, scored 1–5, weighted average default 1:1:1:1, tie→safe wins) and renders one collapsed line `🤖 4축 auto-pick: <option> (완성도=X 단순=Y 안전=Z 표준=W · weighted=<sum>)`, instead of stalling the campaign for the user; the autonomy invariant is preserved — only a human-only gate (credential · irreversible/destructive · genuine open-ended design) and the budget cap (g64) still halt. bin/system_harness.hexa (the deterministic decide() binary) unchanged. Verbs: bare/status · progress (1.1.0 read-only research-ARC bar) · tick [--apply] (0.7.0 deterministic probe→classify→decide harness via bin/system_harness.hexa) · watch · harvest [<id>] · next/redispatch · auto · drive · pursue (0.8.0 — ALL-PATHS autonomy: enumerate EVERY open campaign thread (stalled-resumable jobs · tooling gaps · queued waves · cost-leaks · un-harvested terminals) + fan ALL out in parallel ≤2-3 agents, NO human 'which next?' menu; only genuine human-input gates wait) · mirror [<seed>] (1.2.0 거울방 — DELEGATE to the hexa-loop skill --adapter=atlas, d4 reuse) · stop · cost · queue [add|rm|ls] · upstream [<repo>]. 1.3.0 ADDS an explicit ALL-PARALLEL dispatch principle (↔ project.tape d_parallel_fire): campaign dispatch fires N candidates across DEDICATED PARALLEL pods (one job→one slot · ranks≤physcores/pod · OMP/MKL/OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS=1), NEVER bin-packed into a single-pod sequential onstart.sh chain; a stuck single-pod sequential chain (a flagship blocking the rest) is SPLIT onto parallel pods on sight. Threaded into next/auto/pursue/drive + the queue taxonomy (queued candidates fire in parallel; a single-pod sequential chain is the anti-pattern to split). Live lesson: a 6-perovskite batch chained on one vast pod → 270-thread/load-119 thrash + CaAuH3 blocked 6 others for days. 1.2.0 ADDS `lab mirror` (the mirror room — pure delegation to the hexa-loop skill's --adapter=atlas preset, the old mirror-loop mining→kick→atlas self-evolution ouroboros, NO reimplementation) + documents a planned lab-lifecycle subcommand set (notebook = append-only journal/decision log · bench = micro-experiment sweep wrapping /micro-exp · review = verdict-matrix audit) as stubs. 1.1.0 ADDED `lab progress` — a read-only campaign-ARC 10-cell bar aggregating verdicts-closed (exports/*/ledger.json + .verdicts/), papers-shipped (PAPER.tape), atlas atom-growth (hexa atlas stats), domain milestones (DOMAINS.tape); each source degrades gracefully (absent → dropped from the mean, not 0%). DISTINCT from `status` (per-job operational live dashboard) — `progress` is the epistemic research-program arc. 1.0.0 RENAMED the skill `system → lab` (research-lab metaphor); the `/system` invocation + every prior trigger (관제탑 · mission control · control tower · campaign status) stay live as DEPRECATED aliases — lossless, so existing muscle memory never breaks. All prior verbs preserved verbatim; bin/system_harness.hexa unchanged. Abstract job model. Reuses ./pods.json (cloud dispatch SSOT). Triggers: /lab · 랩 · 연구실 · research lab · lab progress · 연구 진척도 · lab mirror · 거울방 · /system (deprecated) · 관제탑 (deprecated) · 캠페인 현황 · mission control (deprecated) · campaign status (deprecated) · 후보 자율 · 모든 경로 진행 · pursue · tick · 결과보고 추가발사 · 자율 재발사 루프 · control tower (deprecated).
